---
title: "test_mimir_client.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_mimir_client.py"
loc: 47
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.92
style_score: 3.56
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.07
---

## Intent
The `test_mimir_client.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_session, test_mimir_client_get_file_intent, test_mimir_client_search_well, test_mimir_client_index_sector, test_mimir_client_error_handling. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_session, test_mimir_client_get_file_intent, test_mimir_client_search_well, test_mimir_client_index_sector, test_mimir_client_error_handling. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)

### Exports
- `mock_session`
- `test_mimir_client_get_file_intent`
- `test_mimir_client_search_well`
- `test_mimir_client_index_sector`
- `test_mimir_client_error_handling`
